secondary_keyword: low shedding low barking dogs HDB
meta_title: Best Puppy Breeds for HDB Living in Singapore | Curious Tails
meta_description: Low-shedding, low-barking dogs that HDB actually allows: the five breeds that fit flat life best, ranked by alone-time tolerance, noise, and grooming reality.
h1: Low-Shedding, Low-Barking Dogs That HDB Allows
answer_capsule: For HDB flats, the best-fit approved breeds are the Cavapoo (independent, low-shed), Cockapoo (family all-rounder), Bichonpoo and Maltipoo (low-shed companions for homes with company), and the Mini Dachshund (compact character, light-shedding smooth coat). Corgis, Shibas, and Huskies are not HDB-approved.
outline: what HDB living actually demands of a dog (noise/space/alone-time)
the five best-fit breeds ranked with honest trade-offs
the ones that are not allowed
first_party: Placement heuristics: alone-time ranking from two years of matches.
